title.ko: 냉장고; 냉각실; 아이스박스; 달리 제공되지 않는 냉각 또는 동결장치 (냉동 쇼케이스 A47F3/04; 가정용 단열용기 A47J41/00; 냉동차는 클라스 B60부터 B64의 적절한 서브클라스 참조; 단열콘테이너 일반 B65D81/38; 열전달, 열교환 또는 열저장 재료, 예. 냉매; 연소 이외의 화학 반응에 의하여 열 또는 한랭을 발생하는 물질 C09K5/00; 액화 또는 고화가스용 단열용기 F17C; 에어컨 또는 공기 가습 F24F; 냉동기계, 플랜트 및 시스템 F25B; 냉동이 없는 기기 또는 유사한 장치의 냉각 G21B)
title.en: REFRIGERATORS; COLD ROOMS; ICE-BOXES; COOLING OR FREEZING APPARATUS NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR (refrigerated showcases A47F0003040000;thermally-insulated vessels for domestic use A47J0041000000;refrigerated vehicles, see the appropriate subclasses of classes B60-B64;containers with thermal insulation in general B65D0081380000;heat-transfer, heat-exchange or heat-storage materials, e.g. refrigerants, or materials for the production of heat or cold by chemical reactions other than by combustion C09K0005000000;thermally-insulated vessels for liquefied or solidified gases F17C;air-conditioning or air-humidification F24F;refrigeration machines, plants, or systems F25B;cooling of instruments or comparable apparatus without refrigeration G12B)

definition.ko: 냉동기계와 관련되지 않는 장치 냉공기 또는 냉수를 이용하는 것; 다른 저온물질 또는 축냉재 F25D1/00; 3/00 흡열 화학반응 또는 회수하지 않는 증발을 이용하는 것 F25D5/00, F25D7/00 기타장치, 조합 F25D9/00 냉동기계와 관련한 장치; 냉동기계 내장; 가동식; 고정식; 기타 F25D11/00; 13/00; 15/00; 16/00 부력구조 및 배치, 응용일반; 일반; 제상; 피냉각물의 취급 F25D23/00; 21/00; 25/00 냉각유체 또는 기체의 순환; 조명 F25D17/00; 27/00 냉각 유닛의 배치와 장착; 제어 및 안전 장치의 배치와 장착 F25D19/00; 29/00 기타 장치 F25D31/00

title.en: Devices not associated with refrigerating machinery
Devices using naturally-cold air or water
using naturally-cold water, e.g. household-tap water
Devices using other cold materials; Devices using cold-storage bodies
using ice, e.g. ice-boxes
Stationary cabinets
Movable containers
portable, i.e. adapted to be carried personally
using liquefied gases, e.g. liquid air
with conveyors carrying articles to be cooled through the cooling space
using solidified gases, e.g. carbon-dioxide snow
portable, i.e. adapted to be carried personally
Devices using endothermic chemical reactions, e.g. using frigorific mixtures
portable, i.e. adapted to be carried personally

title.ko: 증기를 회수하지 않는 증발효과를 이용하는 장치 (냉각장치를 가지고 있는 버터 또는 치이즈 접시 A47G 19/26)
title.en: Devices using evaporation effects without recovery of the vapour (butter or cheese dishes with cooling devices A47G0019260000)

title.ko: 냉동기계와 관련되지 않으며 그룹 F25D 1/00에서 F25D 7/00까지에 속하지 않는 장치; 그룹 F25D 1/00에서 F25D 7/00까지의 2개 이상의 그룹에 속하는 장치의 조합
title.en: Devices not associated with refrigerating machinery and not covered by groups F25D0001000000-F25D0007000000; Combinations of devices covered by two or more of the groups F25D0001000000-F25D0007000000

title.ko: 냉동기계와 관련된 냉동기계를 내장한 가동식의 장치, 예, 가정용 냉장고
title.en: Devices associated with refrigerating machinery

title.ko: 냉동기계와 관련된 냉동기계를 내장한 가동식의 장치, 예, 가정용 냉장고
title.en: Self-contained movable devices associated with refrigerating machinery, e.g. domestic refrigerators
with cooling compartments at different temperatures
specially adapted for storing deep-frozen articles (F25D0011020000 takes precedence)
Stationary devices associated with refrigerating machinery, e.g. cold rooms
with several cooling compartments, e.g. refrigerated locker systems
the compartments being at different temperatures
with conveyors carrying articles to be cooled through the cooling space

title.ko: 냉동기계와 관련되지 않으며 그룹 F25D 11/00에서 F25D 13/00에 속하지 않는 장치, 예. 냉동기계를 내장하지 않는 가동식의 장치
title.en: Devices associated with refrigerating machinery not covered by group F25D0011000000 or F25D0013000000, e.g. non-self-contained movable devices
Devices using a combination of a cooling mode associated with refrigerating machinery with a cooling mode not associated with refrigerating machinery
Details or features of the devices covered by groups F25D0001000000-F25D0016000000
Arrangements for circulating cooling fluids; Arrangements for circulating gas, e.g. air, within refrigerated spaces
for circulating liquids, e.g. brine
for circulating gas, e.g. by natural convection
by forced circulation
using ducts
Arrangement or mounting of refrigeration units with respect to devices
plug-in type
with more than one refrigeration unit

title.en: Defrosting; Preventing frosting; Removing condensed or defrost water (removing ice or water from heat-exchange apparatus in general F28F0017000000;heating arrangements specially adapted for transparent or reflecting areas H05B0003840000)
Detecting the presence of frost or condensate
Preventing the formation of frost or condensate
Removing frost (defrosting cycles F25B0047020000)
by electric heating
by spraying with fluid
by hot-fluid circulating system separate from the refrigerant system
Collecting or removing condensed and defrost water; Drip trays
General constructional features (F25D0021000000 takes precedence)
Doors; Covers (F25D0023080000 takes precedence)
with special compartments, e.g. butter conditioners

title.ko: 벽(F25D 23/08이 우선; 단열효과가 있는 것 용기 B65D 81/38)
title.en: Walls (F25D0023080000 takes precedence;containers with thermal insulation B65D0081380000)
Parts formed wholly or mainly of plastics materials
Arrangements for mounting in particular locations, e.g. for built-in type, for corner type
Arrangements of compartments additional to cooling compartments; Combinations of refrigerators with other equipment, e.g. stove
Charging, supporting, or discharging the articles to be cooled
by shelves
by conveyors (in general B65G)
Lighting arrangements (in general F21)
Arrangement or mounting of control or safety devices
